zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg於1183年出生在德國貝也爾茲包格時，他的父親Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII43歲，母親Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria27歲。他於1222年12月30日與Jutta von Thüringen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1245年8月21日在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 史馬爾卡爾登-梅寧根亨內格享年62歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-梅寧根亨內格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg于1183年出生在德国貝也爾茲包格时，他的父亲Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII43岁，母亲Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria27岁。他于1222年12月30日与Jutta von Thüringen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1245年8月21日在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 史馬爾卡爾登-梅寧根亨內格享年62岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-梅寧根亨內格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Henneberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Ewald, Kurt, Ulrich.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Henneberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Fritz, Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from a place called Henneberg (see   Henneberg  ).

variants.name: Henneberry
meanings: Americanized form of German and Dutch   Henneberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Poppo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the word denoting the flower, Old English popæg (from Latin papaver). It has been used as a given name since the latter years of the 19th century. It reached a peak of popularity in the 1920s and since the late 1990s has again been back in fashion.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg was born in 1183, in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, was 43 and his mother, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, was 27. He married Jutta von Thüringen on 30 December 1222. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 August 1245, in Henneberg, Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Henneberg, Saxe-Meiningen, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg est né en 1183, à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jutta von Thüringen le 30 décembre 1222. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 août 1245, à Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg 1183 in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII 43 und seine Mutter Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria 27. Er hat am 30. Dezember 1222 Jutta von Thüringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. August 1245 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Deutschland und wurde in Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg è nato il nel 1183 nel Würzburg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jutta von Thüringen il 30 dicembre 1222. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 agosto 1245, nel Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Poppo VII von Hennebergが1183年にドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグで生まれた時，父Poppo Count Of Henneberg XIIは43歳，母Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavariaは27歳であった。1222年12月30日にJutta von Thüringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1245年8月21日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス スチマルカルデン-メイニンジェンヘネバーグで62歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-メイニンジェンヘネバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg(이)가 1183년 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1222년 12월 30일 Jutta von Thüringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 8월 21일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 슈마캘데-인잉 헨버그에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-인잉 헨버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg nasceu em 1183, em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jutta von Thüringen em 30 de dezembro de 1222. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1245, em Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg родился в 1183 г. в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jutta von Thüringen 30 декабря 1222 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 августа 1245 г. в местности хеннебирг, ландкрис щмалкалден-мининген, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хеннебирг, сачсен-мининген, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg nació en 1183, en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jutta von Thüringen el 30 de diciembre de 1222. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1245, en Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Alemania.
